svg.title: AI SDLC Assistant – High-Level Architecture
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram showing user interaction, persona detection, orchestration, agents, RAG pipeline, MCP integrations, and observability for the AI SDLC Assistant.

g.text: Chainlit web chat UI · streaming responses · file upload · action buttons (approve/reject)
Login role · query phrasing classifier · session memory
Stateful graph · conditional routing · HITL pause nodes · Groq llama-3.3-70b + Gemini fallback
Persona-conditioned prompts · developer / manager / stakeholder tone · same data, different language
Azure DevOps / Trello · extensible via MCP protocol
Sprint docs · ticket history · ADRs · PR diffs · policies
LangSmith · trace every LLM call + retrieval step
Ticket creation · PR reviewer assign · escalation · risk alert — all require explicit user approval before action
